title: Qwohog (language)
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Qwohog''' was the native language of the [[Qwohog (species)|Qwohog]] species from [[Hirsi]]. It used sound waves to communicate underwater, but in the air these waves could only be transmitted for four meters. After the Qwohogs came into contact with offworlders, they began using [[Vocabulator/Legends|vocalizer masks]] to translate sound waves and subtle jaw movements into words.

Qwohogs used [[Qwohog sign language]] to communicate out of water. An important part of the species' heritage, it had been replaced by [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]] after the Qwohogs entered the [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] community, but was still widely taught.

Qwohogs who served the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] quickly became fluent in Basic, although Basic-speaking Qwohogs were usually only literate in their own language.

{{Language-stub}}
